source: Illinois Commerce Commission (The Liberty Consulting Group audit)
doc_type: performance audit (wind/ice storm preparedness & restoration verification/monitoring investigation)
source_note: Illinois Commerce Commission — 'Verification/Monitoring Investigation of Wind and Ice Storm Preparedness and Restoration of Ameren Illinois, Final Report', prepared for the ICC by The Liberty Consulting Group (November 29, 2012, 418 pp). Independent performance audit of Ameren Illinois's storm preparedness and restoration. No ICC docket surfaced on the reliability-archive landing page; left null rather than guessed. Predates the FERC 2014+ window, but that constraint is FERC-specific; the state_audit collection already carries older reports. Page 1 verified 2026-07-10: 'Final Report Verification/Monitoring Investigation of Wind and Ice Storm Preparedness and Restoration of Ameren Illinois ... By: The Liberty Consulting Group ... November 29, 2012'. Listed for reference (metadata-only).
